prompt: A retro 1980s arcade with rows of colorful game cabinets including Pac-Man and Space Invaders machines with glowing screens. Neon strip lights in pink and blue glow on the dark ceiling. Black-and-white checkered floor tiles. A prize counter with illuminated shelves sits in the back. Vivid neon-lit atmosphere. To the left, a row of pinball machines with flashing bumper lights stands along the wall, next to a claw crane machine filled with plush toys. To the right, an air hockey table glows under overhead blue neon, and a change machine with a coin slot is mounted on the wall near the restroom entrance. First-person viewer. First-person view at standing eye level looking across the arcade floor toward the game cabinets and prize counter. No held objects.

tracking_object.desc: Pac-Man arcade cabinet on the left

scene_adherence.visible_part: This is a retro 1980s arcade with rows of colorful game cabinets including Pac-Man and Space Invaders machines with glowing screens. Neon strip lights in pink and blue glow on the dark ceiling. The floor is covered with black-and-white checkered tiles. A prize counter with illuminated shelves sits in the back of the arcade. The space has a vivid neon-lit atmosphere.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: To the left of the visible area, a row of pinball machines with flashing bumper lights stands along the wall, next to a claw crane machine filled with plush toys. To the right of the visible area, an air hockey table glows under overhead blue neon, and a change machine with a coin slot is mounted on the wall near the restroom entrance.
